originalTitle: More than 200 rescued from IS-linked group in DR Congo
title: More than 200 rescued from IS-linked group in DR Congo
content: The youngest of those freed from an Allied Democratic Forces camp is a girl aged just 14, Uganda's army says.

originalTitle: Black beauty queen who represented South Africa at Miss World during apartheid dies aged 76
title: Black beauty queen who represented South Africa at Miss World during apartheid dies aged 76
content: At the 1972 Miss World contest, Cynthia Shange was one of two contestants from South Africa - one black and one white.

originalTitle: Nigerian wins global prize for trying to save bats in a country that shuns them
title: Nigerian wins global prize for trying to save bats in a country that shuns them
content: Many Nigerians associate bats with witchcraft but that did not deter ecologist Iroro Tanshi.

originalTitle: Funerals held across Lebanon during 10-day ceasefire
title: Funerals held across Lebanon during 10-day ceasefire
content: Mourners across Lebanon are burying victims of the war with Israel during a 10-day ceasefire.

originalTitle: Rapper D4vd’ charged with murder of 14-year-old girl
title: Rapper D4vd’ charged with murder of 14-year-old girl
content: Prosecutors in California are charging rapper D4vd with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez.

originalTitle: Gunman kills Canadian woman, injures six at Mexico’s Teotihuacan pyramids
title: Gunman kills Canadian woman, injures six at Mexico’s Teotihuacan pyramids
content: Canadian tourist is killed and 6 people injured in shooting at Teotihuacan pyramid near Mexico City, government says.

originalTitle: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
content: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.

originalTitle: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
title: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
content: Prosecutors say the singer, real name David Anthony Burke, could face life in prison due to the nature of the case.

originalTitle: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after issuing tsunami warning
title: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after issuing tsunami warning
content: Japan's meteorological agency warns another, stronger earthquake may hit in the next week,

originalTitle: Rose agrees to succeed Iraola at Bournemouth
title: Rose agrees to succeed Iraola at Bournemouth
content: Marco Rose agrees to take over at Bournemouth when manager Andoni Iraola leaves at the end of the season.

originalTitle: Rosenior feels '100%' support from Chelsea owners
title: Rosenior feels '100%' support from Chelsea owners
content: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior says he feels "100%" support from the club's ownership despite a run of four league defeats without scoring.

originalTitle: 'Worst I've seen' - Leicester face relegation again
title: 'Worst I've seen' - Leicester face relegation again
content: BBC Sport takes a look at what Leicester City need in their seemingly doomed fight for Championship survival.
